methodology: Typical all-inclusive cash package ranges (surgery, facility, standard implant where applicable) derived from published medical-tourism industry benchmarks and cross-border hospital list prices. Excludes airfare, lodging, travel insurance, and complication care. Not quotes from individual clinics.
sources: Patients Beyond Borders / MTA published procedure cost surveys
OECD and academic cross-country hospital price comparisons
JCI-accredited hospital public international patient price lists (aggregated)
packageIncludesDefault: Standard hospital stay for procedure type

destinations.accreditationNote: Many hospitals hold JCI, COFEPRIS, or IMSS-equivalent accreditation.
destinations.travelFromUs: Direct flights from most U.S. hubs; land border options in the Southwest.

destinations.accreditationNote: Strong private-hospital sector; several JCI-accredited facilities.
destinations.travelFromUs: Nonstop flights from major U.S. cities; popular for orthopedics and dental.

destinations.accreditationNote: Growing medical-tourism hub with JCI hospitals in major cities.
destinations.travelFromUs: Direct flights to Bogotá and Medellín from many U.S. gateways.

destinations.accreditationNote: Large JCI/NABH-accredited hospital networks; strong cardiac and orthopedic volume.
destinations.travelFromUs: Long-haul flights; often lowest cash packages for major surgery.

destinations.accreditationNote: Bumrungrad-class hospitals; JCI accreditation common in private sector.
destinations.travelFromUs: One-stop flights via Asia hubs; established international patient programs.

destinations.accreditationNote: High-volume private hospitals; JCI and ISO certifications widely marketed.
destinations.travelFromUs: Direct Istanbul flights from East Coast and Midwest hubs.
